steps: Access the capsule for this project at https://codeocean.com/capsule/0923404/tree. This project is to build different models to identify different species of flowers.
The data which are images of iris are stored in the images files of data.
Click the " Reproducible Run " to generate a html.file for the ipynb file which contains the code.
